entries.title: On 2 Corinthians 8:7
entries.excerpt: Therefore that ye abound in every thing; in faith and utterance, and knowledge, and in all earnestness. See again his exhortation accompanied with commendations, greater commendations. And he said not, 'that you give,' but that you abound; in faith, namely, of the gifts, and in utterance, the word of wisdom, and knowledge, namely, of the doctrines, and in all earnestness, to the attaining of all other virtue. And in your love, that, namely of which I have before spoken, of which I have also made proof. That ye may abound in this grace also. Do you see that for this reason it was that he began…
